base_l2_ens.name: jaywisdom.base.eth
base_l2_ens.role: public L2 discovery and receipt surface

correction.rule: operator declaration -> explicit target -> build action
correction.prototype_status: receipts-engine-v1 is non-canonical unless promoted by manifest

witness_rules: repository name alone is not jurisdiction
ENS identity is part of operator surface but not authority
Base L2 identity is part of public discovery and receipt surface but not authority
public repo is the witness surface
